grid_source: raw_json_ตัวที่ใช้งานจริง/02บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_02_หน้า00_gridline.json
schema_note: Alternate foundation system to S-03 (pile footing) -- used if soil bearing capacity > 10 ton/sqm per S-01 notes. This house has no letter+number footing mark like house #1's 'F1'/'F2' -- the printed mark IS the dimension notation itself (e.g. '(F0.8x0.8)'), confirmed by detail sheets S-09/S-10 which title themselves by the same dimension notation (e.g. 'ขยายฐานราก F0.60x0.60'). Following house #1's convention, footing and column marks are recorded as SEPARATE elements (not combined into one element_id) even though the plan prints them as a combined label at each point, e.g. '(F0.8x0.8),C1A'.
warnings: Building footprint is irregular -- row F has all 4 columns, rows E/D have all 4, row C has all 4, but rows B and A only have columns 2-3 (a porch/carport extension south of grid C occupying only the middle bay). No footing/column at B-1, B-4, A-1, A-4.
